message:
chore: suppress clippy lints acceptable in test code

Add #![cfg_attr(test, allow(...))] attributes to lib.rs and
ext_release_binary_e2e.rs to suppress clippy warnings that are appropriate
in test contexts (unused_variables, assertions_on_constants,
uninlined_format_args, etc.) while keeping strict linting for production code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,17 @@
 
 #![forbid(unsafe_code)]
 #![allow(dead_code, clippy::unused_async, unused_attributes)]
+#![cfg_attr(
+    test,
+    allow(
+        unused_variables,
+        clippy::assertions_on_constants,
+        clippy::match_same_arms,
+        clippy::uninlined_format_args,
+        clippy::missing_const_for_fn,
+        clippy::collapsible_if
+    )
+)]
 // Allow pedantic lints during early development - can tighten later
 #![allow(
     clippy::must_use_candidate,
